uplink.description: Full environment record: Vbat 3.3 V, Vbus 4.7 V, boot 12, four gas-electrode rails 0.5 V, then temperature 21.5 C, RH ~55%, barometric pressure 1013.2 hPa. Covers air.temperature + air.relativeHumidity + air.pressure + battery.
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Decoder, port 1 format 0x38) on these bytes and normalizing per codec.js (t->air.temperature, rh->air.relativeHumidity, p->air.pressure, Vbat->battery; Vbus/boot/vGas->camelCase extras; dewpoint/heat-index dropped). RH raw 54.99961852445258 rounded to 4 decimals. Pressure 1013.2 hPa is atmospheric (vocabulary air.pressure 900-1100).

uplink.description: Sub-zero environment with network timestamp: Vbat 3.0 V, four gas-electrode rails 0.5 V, temperature -5.25 C, RH 80%, pressure 990.0 hPa, boot-time timestamp 2025-03-24T09:18:19Z.
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising the second-bitmap timestamp block (flags2 0x04). Expected.data from reference/upstream-codec.js then normalized: timestamp -> time (RFC3339), timeType kept as extra; negative i16 temperature -5.25 C. Pressure 990.0 hPa is atmospheric.

uplink.description: Gas-only record (flags 0xF0): CO/NO2/O3/SO2 ppm concentrations plus the four electrode rails at 0.5 V, no environment block.
uplink._note: Synthetic payload; expected.data from reference/upstream-codec.js. Gas concentrations have no vocabulary home (air.co2 models CO2, not CO/NO2/O3/SO2) so they are camelCase extras coPpm/no2Ppm/o3Ppm/so2Ppm. UFLT16 scaling (CO x1000, NO2 x10, O3/SO2 x30) rounded to 4 decimals. flags2 byte 0x00 = no environment block.

uplink.description: Upstream TTN example input: full multigas + particulate record (flags 0xFF), flags2 0x00 (no environment block). Exercises PM mass-concentration and particle-count extras.
uplink._note: Input bytes are the upstream codec-model4933 example (Apache-2.0). expected.data authored here by running reference/upstream-codec.js then normalizing (Vbat->battery, Vbus/boot/pm/pc/gas voltages and concentrations -> camelCase extras; dewpoint/heat-index dropped). The example's flags2 byte is 0x00, so no temperature/RH/pressure/timestamp are present, matching upstream.

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort (only port 1 / format 0x38 is an uplink record).
uplink._note: Port 3 carries downlink responses upstream (DecodeDownlinkResponse), not normalized measurements, so this codec rejects it.
